title: Kingdom Blocks
description: This mod adds enemies and weapons from the Kingdom Hearts series!
body:
# Heartless

Shadow: A small and weak heartless. Has 30 health and deals 4 damage.

![Shadow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6f0a5acabd59270e0a0a62c8c75f9d3c8384ce6.png)



Soldier: A slightly tougher heartless that's more aggressive than the shadow. Has 30 health, 10 armor, and deals 4 damage.

![Soldier](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/278228939656d5f261f3c81a9c23b77c39376919.png)



Red Nocturne: A flying heartless that shoots fire at the player. Has 15 health.

![Red Nocturne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5d0d01a16e625235b85fb37d65e48479b008233.png)

 
# Keyblades

Keyblades are new weapons added in this mod. They are like swords, but deal 2.5 times more damage to heartless!

![Keyblades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c57120692c52a5b1e696df80eabbe6befc4c12.png)

You can use a Magic Workbench to equip up to 4 spells on your keyblade!

![Magic Workbench UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab06123a1a4e7e493b1c15381dcd689302c79bde.png)

 

In the future, I plan to add more enemies and weapons!
